phonetic: 蓹藢lu藧m瑟n蓹(蕣)藞s瑟l瑟ke瑟t
phoneticUs: 蓹藢lu藧m蓹no蕣藞s瑟l蓹k瑟t; 蓹藢lu藧m蓹no蕣藞s瑟l蓹藢ke瑟t
examples: The aluminosilicate fiber paper was produced with aluminosilicate fiber by using conventional papermaking process.
It derives from land materials, mostly in the form of aluminosilicate minerals, and is deposited in the ocean by rivers and wind.
In this paper, the influence of binders on the fatigue behavior of aluminosilicate fibre reinforced ZL109 alloy composites was studied.
Gorilla glass is an environmentally friendly alkali-aluminosilicate thin sheet glass that is both scratch resistant and durable.
